summary: test_tcl test module failed with 2 consistent assertion failures on Windows x64 build. The test was re-run and failed again with the same failures, indicating deterministic test assertion issues.
root_cause: Two specific test cases within test_tcl are failing with assertion failures. While many individual tests (testCallException, testEvalException, testPackageRequireException, etc.) pass, 2 test cases consistently fail on both initial run and re-run.

evidence.reason: Direct indication that the test_tcl module encountered exactly 2 test assertion failures
Test was re-run and failed again with the same count of failures, indicating deterministic test failure rather than transient flakiness
Consistent failure count across initial run and re-run demonstrates reproducible assertion failure
Multiple individual tests within test_tcl pass, showing the failures are localized to specific test cases, not global module issues

suggested_fix: The provided log does not include the actual assertion error messages. Obtain the full verbose output from test_tcl to identify which 2 test cases are failing and what assertions are failing.
